parts.text:
Investigate prior-session provenance for this question without loading all transcripts into the parent session.

Question: Why does src/auth/queue.ts deduplicate refresh work per tenant instead of using one global mutex?
Expected relevant prior-session title: Auth refresh queue rationale
Ignore billing retry and markdown parser distractor sessions.

Required workflow: use session_lookup first, then session_detail with detail='messages' on the relevant blob, then message_detail for one exact message before answering. Return only the exact source identifiers and concise answer material needed for the parent JSON: session_id, blob_id, message_id, answer, why_not_global_mutex, and irrelevant_context_ignored. If unavailable, use empty strings.
I’ll locate the prior session by title/keywords, inspect only its message index, then fetch the single relevant message for provenance.
